response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with ~15 years of fullstack experience, strong TypeScript/Node.js/React depth, MongoDB and AWS exposure, Kubernetes/Docker familiarity, and directly relevant AI-agent development (MCP code generators and agentic tooling) — a rare requirement he explicitly meets. Testing culture is a clear strength (TDD, test-runner authorship, testing workshops). Gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Vitest specifically, and no Kotlin, though Java and multi-language proficiency suggest a fast ramp-up.
strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS)
Hands-on AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks)
Deep testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin absent from skills; Java experience appears dated (pre-2018)
Currently in a career gap since October 2025
